title: hoya carnosa
intro: Hoya carnosa, also known as the wax plant or porcelain flower, is a tropical, evergreen climbing plant native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its fragrant, star-shaped flowers and waxy, thick leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Hoya carnosa is also used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety, and improve sleep quality, as well as to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
